history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a white shirt and a black backpack rides a light blue scooter on a paved road. The person is wearing a helmet with a blue and white design and a red circular emblem. The scooter has a vintage aesthetic, with chrome accents. The road is mostly empty, with trees lining the sides and some buildings visible in the background. The lighting suggests it's daytime, with shadows cast by the scooter and trees. The overall mood is casual and serene, depicting a simple journey on a sunny day. The color palette is dominated by the blue of the scooter, green of the trees, and grays of the road and pavement. The image has a slightly low-angle perspective, looking from behind the rider.
